steps.title: Attach the title directly
steps.content: The sentence refers to a specific novel, Mexican Gothic. Because the title identifies which novel is meant, it functions restrictively after "novel" and should not be separated from that noun by punctuation.

steps.title: Reject added punctuation
steps.content: Choice B uses a colon, which would introduce an explanation or list rather than attach a title. Choice C uses a comma, incorrectly treating the title as extra nonrestrictive information. Choice D opens a parenthesis without closing it, making the sentence incomplete. The answer is A.
